ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: The API Key associated with your OpenAI account, used for querying GPT. Go here to obtain one.
ast.target: 与您的 OpenAI 账户关联的 API 密钥，用于查询 GPT。请点击此处获取。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: The maximum number of tokens consumed for each question. See tokens to better understand how tokens are quantized. (Default = 16)
ast.target: 每个问题消耗的最大令牌数。请参阅令牌以更好地理解令牌的量化方式。（默认值 = 16）

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not parse message into JSON:
ast.target: 无法将消息解析为 JSON：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generate multiple versions of questions and choose your favorite ones!
ast.target: 生成多个版本的问题并选择您最喜欢的！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The port number used to host Anki Connect
ast.target: 用于托管 Anki Connect 的端口号

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the deck in Anki you want to export flashcards to, by default
ast.target: 您希望默认将闪卡导出到的 Anki 中的牌组名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The number of questions to generate from the file.
ast.target: 从文件生成的问题数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The number of alternatives to generate for each question. Zero means no alteratives.
ast.target: 为每个问题生成的备选方案数量。零表示没有备选方案。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The number of questions to generate from the selected text.
ast.target: 从选定文本生成的问题数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Value for nucleus sampling. Lower values mean the output considers the tokens comprising higher probability mass. (Default = 1)
ast.target: 核采样值。较低的值意味着输出考虑构成较高质量概率的令牌。（默认值 = 1）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far. Higher values decrease chance of 'repetition'. (Default = 0)
ast.target: 正值会根据新令牌在文本中现有的频率进行惩罚。较高的值会降低“重复”的可能性。（默认值 = 0）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far. Higher values increase chance of 'creativity'. (Default = 0)
ast.target: 正值会根据新令牌是否出现在文本中进行惩罚。较高的值会增加“创造性”的可能性。（默认值 = 0）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 每个问题的最大令牌数

ast.name: warn
ast.source: winston: exitOnError cannot be true with no exception handlers.
ast.target: winston：在没有异常处理器的情况下，exitOnError 不能为 true。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: winston: exitOnError cannot be true with no rejection handlers.
ast.target: winston：在没有拒绝处理器的情况下，exitOnError 不能为 true。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Callback function no longer supported as of winston@3.0.0
ast.target: 自 winston@3.0.0 起不再支持回调函数

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Level "log" not defined: conflicts with the method "log". Use a different level name.
ast.target: 级别 \"log\" 未定义：与方法 \"log\" 冲突。请使用不同的级别名称。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Your anki account has no decks. Create a new one before using!
ast.target: 您的 Anki 账户没有牌组。请先创建一个再使用！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There is nothing in the file!

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The value you entered is not a number value
ast.target: 您输入的值不是数字值

ast.name: description
ast.source: A logger for just about everything.
ast.target: 一个适用于几乎所有场景的日志记录器。

ast.name: message
ast.source: OpenAI API key not provided! Please go to your 'Auto Anki' settings to set an API key.
ast.target: 未提供 OpenAI API 密钥！请前往您的 'Auto Anki' 设置以设置 API 密钥。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Something happened while parsing OpenAI output! Please contact a developer for more support.
ast.target: 解析 OpenAI 输出时发生错误！请联系开发者以获取更多支持。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将当前文件导出到 Anki

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将高亮文本导出到 Anki

ast.name: text
ast.source: How many questions should be generated?

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pick one or more of the questions below you want to export to Anki.
ast.target: 选择您想要导出到 Anki 的以下一个或多个问题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Either an error occured or no Anki decks were found
ast.target: 发生错误或未找到 Anki 牌组

ast.name: text
ast.source: Pick one of the following available Anki decks to export to.
ast.target: 选择以下可用的 Anki 牌组之一进行导出。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Advanced Options for OpenAI's GPT Models
ast.target: OpenAI GPT 模型的高级选项
